## What this page is

Explain a general training concept with cited ranges.

## What this page is not

This is not your personal program and does not adapt to symptoms, goals, equipment, or training response.

## Plain-language overview

Explain the concept for beginners.

## General ranges

Use broad, cited ranges where the evidence supports them.

## What changes this in real life

Explain that individualization belongs with a qualified coach or clinician when needed.

## Sources

Add public-health and resistance-training sources with page-local reference definitions.
